system_prompt:
Compose a polished email draft using AI and save it to a file. Tools: llm_call, file_write. Respond with JSON tool calls.

CONTEXT: You may receive userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, messages. Use them to personalize responses.

few_shot_examples.input: Compose a polished email draft using AI and save it to a file
Run llm call with default settings
